input: Interpret GWAS SNP rs12913832 in HERC2/OCA2 region. Associated with eye color.

expected_details.effect_size: very large for a GWAS hit (OR >10 for blue eyes)
expected_details.mechanism: regulatory variant affecting OCA2 transcription → melanin production

input: Interpret GWAS SNP rs1801282 (Pro12Ala) in PPARG for type 2 diabetes risk.

expected_details.association: protective — Ala allele associated with reduced T2DM risk (OR ~0.86)
expected_details.mechanism: reduced PPARG activity → improved insulin sensitivity
expected_details.drug_relevance: PPARG is the target of thiazolidinediones (pioglitazone)

input: Interpret the TCF7L2 rs7903146 variant for T2DM risk. This is the strongest common-variant T2DM signal.

expected_details.effect_size: OR ~1.4 per T allele (strongest common T2DM signal)
expected_details.clinical_utility: included in most T2DM PRS panels

input: Interpret APOE ε4 allele for Alzheimer's disease risk. Include dosage effect.

expected_details.clinical_relevance: ARIA risk modifier for anti-amyloid therapies (lecanemab)

input: Interpret the 9p21.3 locus (rs1333049/rs10757278) for coronary artery disease. This is in a gene desert.

expected_details.nearest_genes: CDKN2A/CDKN2B (but variant is in intergenic region)
expected_details.mechanism: affects ANRIL lncRNA expression → regulation of cell proliferation in vascular smooth muscle
expected_details.notable: one of the first replicated GWAS CAD loci; mechanism via non-coding RNA

input: Interpret HLA-DRB1*04:01 association with rheumatoid arthritis.

expected_details.association: shared epitope hypothesis — specific amino acids in HLA-DR β chain pocket present arthritogenic peptides
expected_details.clinical_relevance: anti-CCP positive RA strongly associated; informs prognosis

input: Interpret rs9939609 in FTO for obesity risk.

expected_details.effect_size: OR ~1.3 per risk allele; ~3 kg weight difference per allele
expected_details.mechanism: variant affects IRX3/IRX5 expression → adipocyte thermogenesis
expected_details.nuance: FTO was named but the causal gene is likely IRX3/IRX5 based on functional studies

input: Interpret rs4149056 (SLCO1B1*5) for statin-induced myopathy risk from GWAS.

expected_details.association: strong: OR ~4.5 for simvastatin myopathy per C allele
expected_details.mechanism: reduced hepatic uptake transporter function → increased systemic statin exposure
expected_details.clinical_action: CPIC guideline: avoid simvastatin >20mg in *5 carriers; consider alternative statin

input: A GWAS hit at rs12345 (p=3e-12) maps to a 500kb LD block containing 8 genes. How would you prioritize the causal gene?
Interpret a SNP (rs2228145 in IL6R) that associates with LOWER risk of coronary artery disease but HIGHER risk of rheumatoid arthritis.

expected_details.pleiotropy_type: antagonistic (opposite direction effects on different traits)
expected_details.mechanism: IL-6 trans-signaling inhibition: reduces vascular inflammation (good for CAD) but impairs immune regulation (bad for RA)
expected_details.drug_relevance: tocilizumab (anti-IL-6R) — beneficial for RA, CV effects being studied
expected_details.mendelian_randomization: IL6R variants used as instruments to estimate causal effects of IL-6 pathway
